candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net sales in preview and candidate list includes both. Prefer broader standard revenue label as priority.
Not revenue; this is COGS.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line item across years; do not sum.

candidates.why: Exact COGS/cost of sales label on the income statement; identical to Costs of goods and services sold.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not period COGS expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct income-statement COGS line from candidates.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A/overhead row, populated across years. Per rule, if explicit SG&A exists and is populated, select only that row.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so only this row is selected. Excludes R&D, COGS, D&A, and other non-SG&A items.

Amortization, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.

candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not period expense.

candidates.why: Best available reported finance-cost line; includes interest and likely broader finance expenses. Prefer as main XINT when pure interest expense is not separately reported for all years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense line but appears limited to lease liabilities only, so incomplete for total interest expense.

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest line only; incomplete for total interest expense.
Balancing row, should not be preferred over explicit reported finance expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer broader reported finance expense line; fall back to explicit lease interest line if needed. Excluded balancing and supplemental rows.

candidates.row_label: Portion of profit after tax from associated companies recognized in accordance with the equity method
candidates.why: Income-statement profit share, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests and is exactly owner/parent equity.
Total equity, but less preferred because parent-attributable equity line exists.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list prefers parent-attributable equity to avoid double counting with MIB. Included Total Equity as fallback only if label changes across years.
No non-controlling interest/minority interest line is present on the provided balance sheet. Since BE uses parent-attributable equity, MIB is set to empty/0.
